description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_CON, CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_ICON, CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_CHRICN, and is implemented by a call to CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_CON, CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_ICON, CHANGE_MTDCAUXMOD_CHRICN. Use this API to change the value of an ICON and/or CON of an auxiliary signal model of a specified multi-terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_mtdcauxmod_data(dc,isgndx,name,j,rdata,i,idata,chdata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Number of the multi-terminal dc line receiving the of the auxiliary signal model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model, or 0 for no con change (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: i
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model, or 0 for no icon change (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New integer icon value. (input; unchanged by default). When a character value is intended for an ICON value, the IDATA entry is ignored and the integer ICON is set to 0).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value (no default allowed if the character icon is to be changed). when an integer value is intended for an icon value, the chdata entry must be either defaulted or specified as either ‘$$’ or ‘ ‘; the character icon is set to ‘$$’. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a multi-terminal dc line.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this multi-terminal dc line.
model at this index for this multi-terminal dc line is aaa not xxx.
no CONs used in model; or.
no input ICONs used in model; or.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model; or.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
